headline: AI models clash on market direction amid GameStop-eBay drama
summary: Models showed sharp disagreement on overall market direction, with SPY predictions split 3-2 bullish despite geopolitical tensions. Claude stood out with aggressive calls on the GameStop-eBay situation, while both Claude and Gemini aligned on XOM's oil-driven rally at exactly $135 target.

consensus_picks.note: Three models bet on SPY recovery despite GPT-4o's bearish stance on geopolitical risks.
Both models identically targeted $135 on crude oil surge from Iran tensions.
Gemini bearish on iPhone concerns while GPT-4o and Grok see upside, with wildly different targets from $210 to $285.
Both models bearish on Tesla citing EV competition and mixed sentiment.
Crypto bulls see momentum continuing with targets near $80,000.

best_call.summary: Results pending - Claude's 85% confidence EBAY surge call on GameStop bid news looks promising.

worst_call.summary: Results pending - models await market close to determine accuracy.
